data.title: Bitget Wallet launches PAXG on-chain gold trading event
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget Wallet, the world's leading Web3 wallet, now supports PAXG spot and contract transactions, and has simultaneously launched trading activities to encourage users to deploy gold assets on the chain. The event will be held from 14:00 on April 12 to 14:00 on April 20 (UTC+8). Users who complete PAXG transactions can share a total of $9,000 in rewards.
PAXG is a token issued by Paxos, each anchored to 1 ounce of physical gold. As the international situation heats up and the gold price breaks through $3,200, on-chain gold is becoming a new destination for safe-haven funds. Bitget Wallet provides a simple and smooth one-stop trading experience, supports one-click cross-chain transactions of 130+ public chains and millions of assets, and is equipped with Gas optimization and security protection mechanisms to help users easily grasp gold value preservation opportunities while enjoying the actual benefits brought by DeFi.

data.title: DWF Labs has deployed USD1 liquidity on ETH and BSC, and USD1 will be officially launched
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to @EmberCN monitoring, DWF Labs has begun to deploy the USD1 liquidity of the US dollar stablecoin launched by WLFI, a DeFi project supported by the Trump family, on the chain, marking that the stablecoin now supports on-chain circulation and transactions. Data shows that in the past 8 days, the DWF Labs address received a total of 11 million USD1 from WLFI on both Ethereum and BSC chains.
The current deployment includes:
Ethereum chain: USDT/USD1, USDC/USD1, USDf/USD1, ETH/USD1 trading pairs have been deployed on Uniswap V3;
BSC chain: USDT/USD1, BNB/USD1 trading pairs have been deployed on PancakeSwap V3.

data.title: BlackRock BUIDL Fund Surpasses $2.3 Billion, Sets New Record
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, data from DefiLlama indicates that the BlackRock BUIDL Fund has exceeded $2.3 billion, currently valued at $2.372 billion. This marks a weekly increase of 25.07%, setting a new historical high.

The fund's assets on Ethereum have reached $2.227 billion, while its holdings on Avalanche amount to $52.72 million.

data.title: TRC20-USDT issuance exceeds 68.7 billion, setting a new record
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: According to the latest news, the issuance of TRC20-USDT has increased to 68.7 billion, a record high. Since the beginning of this year, the TRON network has cumulatively issued nearly 9 billion USDT. As of now, TRC20-USDT accounts for 47.6% of the total issuance of USDT in the entire network, with 64.02 million accounts and a cumulative transfer of more than 2.435 billion transactions.
In addition, the total number of TRON accounts exceeded 300 million yesterday. Sun Yuchen, the founder of TRON, said: "Everything has just begun. Our future is 8 billion people around the world."
TRC20-USDT is a stable currency anchored to the US dollar issued by Tether based on the TRON network. The characteristics of fast transfer speed and low handling fees have attracted a large number of users, and it has been supported by many exchanges such as Binance, HTX, OKX, Bitfinex, MEXC, KuCoin, Gate.io, and Poloniex. USDT based on the TRC20 version will greatly enhance TRON's existing decentralized application ecosystem, bring higher overall value storage and stronger decentralized exchange liquidity, and provide a more convenient blockchain entry for enterprise-level partners and institutional investors.

data.title: Binance Market Update (2025-04-12)
data.description:
The global cryptocurrency market cap now stands at $2.60T, up by 0.25% over the last day, according to CoinMarketCap data.

Bitcoin (BTC) has been trading between $81,341 and $84,300 over the past 24 hours. As of 09:30 AM (UTC) today, BTC is trading at $83,458, up by 1.70%.

Most major cryptocurrencies by market cap are trading higher. Market outperformers include BABY, GUN, and VIRTUAL, up by 86%, 37%, and 33%, respectively.

Bitcoin Whale Addresses Surge Following Trump’s Tariff Pause — Largest Daily Spike Since February
